mapper.sql: select p.project_id, p.project_key, p.name, p.description, p.status, p.template, p.owner_id, su.nick_name as owner_name, p.start_date, p.end_date, p.create_by, p.create_time, p.update_by, p.update_time from project p left join sys_user su on su.user_id = p.owner_id where p.deleted = 0
mapper.insert: insert into project (project_key, name, description, status, template, owner_id, start_date, end_date, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time) values (#{projectKey}, #{name}, #{description}, #{status}, #{template}, #{ownerId}, #{startDate}, #{endDate}, #{createBy}, now(), #{updateBy}, now())
mapper.update:
update project
name = #{name}, description = #{description}, status = #{status}, template = #{template}, owner_id = #{ownerId}, start_date = #{startDate}, end_date = #{endDate}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = now()
where project_id = #{projectId} and deleted = 0
update project set deleted = 1 where project_id = #{projectId}
